findings.description: Missing PascalCase class names used in code examples: `FileInputStream` (used in setBinaryStream example), `FileOutputStream` (used in binary file output example), `InputStream` (used in getBinaryStream loop). These are referenced directly in the code samples within s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `FileInputStream fis = new FileInputStream(file);` and `InputStream pdfData = null; FileOutputStream output = null;`

findings.description: Missing PascalCase class names from code examples: `W11AE01Form` and `W11AE02Form` (form classes used in 1件/複数件 update examples), `CM211AE1Component` (component class referenced in SQL file path and code), `getBatchSize` (method used in batch size check logic).
